title: Welcome to the MedEffect e-Notice - Canada.ca
content:
## Welcome to the MedEffect e-Notice
This message confirms that you are subscribed to Health Canada's free electronic mailing list to receive safety advisories for marketed health products, as well as the monthly Health Product Infowatch.
If  you  wish  to  unsubscribe  from this  mailing  list,  please  go  to Stay Informed Medeffect Canada .
For all other enquiries, contact us at hc.MedEffect.Notice-Avis.MedEffet.sc@canada.ca .
